title: Python Backend Engineer
description: We are looking for a Python engineer to build FastAPI services on Linux. Strong SQL and REST API experience required. CLI tooling and automation experience a plus. Docker and AWS helpful.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: Seeking React and TypeScript expert for building dynamic UI components. Heavy frontend focus. Experience with Angular or Vue a bonus. Minimal backend responsibilities.

title: Linux Systems Engineer
description: Maintain Linux servers, write Bash automation scripts, develop internal CLI tools in Python. Experience with SQL databases and containerization required.
